human_verification.notes: Verified broker-client service boundaries, source coverage, complaint and exception escalation behavior, and scenario-to-ability mappings for the validated spec pack.

review_notes: All 12 scenarios pass with explicit service-resolution, communication, refusal, and escalation behavior.
Required abilities across shared, service-support-and-resolution, and financial-services-and-insurance sets are fully covered and mapped.

specialist_owned_evidence: Evidence-backed broker-client request handling is constrained to documented customs, broker, and billing records.
Complaint, unsupported exception, and repeat-failure escalation behavior is explicit and routed to the correct adjacent owners.
TBML, sanctions, reconciliation, and policy-conflict conditions trigger escalation instead of overconfident client-service closure.
Runtime remains `specification-based`, with no retained-implementation claim embedded in this package.
notes: No blocking unresolved ambiguity remains because tenant-specific approval thresholds are converted into explicit escalation requirements.
Pack is ready for validated specification-based deployment and future promotion to a retained-implementation package if demand justifies it.
